basic_details.job_title: DCPU Gopalganj – Nurse, Chowkidar and More – 11 Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Gopalganj (DCPU Gopalganj) Recruitment 2026 for 11 posts of Various Contractual. Candidates with 8th Pass, Graduate, MBBS, GNM/Bachelor in Nursing Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 02-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through DCPU Gopalganj official website gopalganj.nic.in.

qualification.education_qualification: 8th Pass, Graduate, MBBS, GNM/Bachelor in Nursing

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Gopalganj Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
